requirement_topic.en: EMC (VCCI) and Radio (MIC Giteki) for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC（VCCI）与无线电（MIC技适）
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC（VCCI）與無線電（MIC技適）

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus subject to Japan's EMC framework. EMC for IT/multimedia equipment in Japan is principally addressed through the VCCI (Voluntary Control Council for Interference) self-regulatory scheme based on CISPR limits (e.g., CISPR 32 / J55032), with VCCI conformity widely treated as the de-facto market expectation. If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it becomes radio equipment under the Radio Act (電波法) and requires MIC (Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications) technical conformity certification — the Giteki mark (技適マーク) — issued by a Registered Certification Body. The diamond PSE mark under DENAN remains required for the battery itself; VCCI EMC and Giteki radio obligations are additional and parallel.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电子装置，须适用日本EMC框架。日本IT/多媒体设备的EMC主要通过基于CISPR限值（如CISPR 32 / J55032）的VCCI（电波障碍自主规制协议会）自律规制方案处理，VCCI符合性普遍被视为事实上的市场期望。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），则依据电波法（電波法）成为无线电设备，须取得总务省（MIC）技术基准适合认证——技适标志（技適マーク），由登录认证机构颁发。电池本身仍须取得DENAN下的菱形PSE标志；VCCI EMC及技适无线电义务为额外且并行的要求。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電子裝置，須適用日本EMC框架。日本IT/多媒體設備的EMC主要透過基於CISPR限值（如CISPR 32 / J55032）的VCCI（電波障礙自主規制協議會）自律規制方案處理，VCCI符合性普遍被視為事實上的市場期望。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），則依據電波法（電波法）成為無線電設備，須取得總務省（MIC）技術基準適合認證——技適標誌（技適マーク），由登錄認證機構頒發。電池本身仍須取得DENAN下的菱形PSE標誌；VCCI EMC及技適無線電義務為額外且並行的要求。

standards_or_laws: VCCI Council Regulations — Voluntary Control Council for Interference by ITE (based on CISPR 32 / J55032 emission limits)
Radio Act (電波法) — Japan, administered by MIC — technical conformity (Giteki, 技適) for radio equipment
Ordinance Regulating Radio Equipment (無線設備規則) — MIC technical standards for wireless modules
J55032 / CISPR 32 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Part 1: Class B equipment) for emissions, and GB/T 17618-2015 (Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised under Japan's VCCI scheme or the Radio Act Giteki conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——第1部分：B类设备），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性限值和测量方法）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准在日本VCCI方案或电波法技适合格评定路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——第1部分：B類設備），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性限值和測量方法）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准在日本VCCI方案或電波法技適合格評定路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics (USB charging IC, protection circuit, display, or wireless function) must address Japan's EMC and radio framework, which is structurally different from China's. EMC is handled via VCCI self-regulation (CISPR-based) rather than a single mandatory directive, but VCCI registration and marking is the practical market expectation for ITE/multimedia equipment. Key gaps: (1) for wireless variants, MIC Giteki (技適) technical conformity certification under the Radio Act is mandatory and is issued by a Japan-Registered Certification Body — SRRC approval is not transferable; (2) Japan radio rules restrict permitted frequency bands and power levels (e.g., 2.4 GHz channel/power rules), so devices designed for the Chinese market may need re-characterisation; (3) the Giteki mark must be displayed on the product or screen. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals may support engineering review but are not accepted as standalone evidence for Japanese VCCI registration or Giteki certification.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源（USB充电IC、保护电路、显示屏或无线功能）须应对日本EMC及无线电框架，其在结构上不同于中国。EMC通过VCCI自律规制（基于CISPR）处理，而非单一强制指令，但VCCI注册及标识是ITE/多媒体设备的实际市场期望。主要差距：（1）对于无线型号，电波法下的MIC技适（技適）技术基准适合认证为强制性，须由日本登录认证机构颁发——SRRC核准不可转移；（2）日本无线电规则限制允许的频段和功率（如2.4 GHz频道/功率规则），面向中国市场设计的设备可能需重新表征；（3）技适标志须显示在产品或屏幕上。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程审查，但不能作为日本VCCI注册或技适认证的独立充分证据。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源（USB充電IC、保護電路、顯示幕或無線功能）須應對日本EMC及無線電框架，其在結構上不同於中國。EMC透過VCCI自律規制（基於CISPR）處理，而非單一強制指令，但VCCI註冊及標識是ITE/多媒體設備的實際市場期望。主要差距：（1）對於無線型號，電波法下的MIC技適（技適）技術基準適合認證為強制性，須由日本登錄認證機構頒發——SRRC核准不可轉移；（2）日本無線電規則限制允許的頻段和功率（如2.4 GHz頻道/功率規則），面向中國市場設計的設備可能需重新表徵；（3）技適標誌須顯示在產品或螢幕上。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程審查，但不能作為日本VCCI註冊或技適認證的獨立充分證據。

mandatory_status.target: VCCI EMC is a voluntary self-regulatory scheme but is the de-facto market expectation for ITE/multimedia equipment; MIC Giteki (技適) radio conformity under the Radio Act is a mandatory legal obligation for power banks with wireless functions before placement on the Japanese market; the DENAN diamond PSE mark for the battery applies in parallel
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus subject to Japan's EMC framework via the VCCI self-regulatory scheme (CISPR-based), which is the practical market expectation rather than a single mandatory directive. Wireless variants are subject to mandatory MIC Giteki (技適) technical conformity certification under the Radio Act, issued by a Japan-Registered Certification Body. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals are not standalone Japanese conformity evidence. These EMC/radio obligations apply in parallel with the DENAN diamond PSE mark for the battery itself.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属于电子装置，须通过VCCI自律规制方案（基于CISPR）适用日本EMC框架，这是实际市场期望而非单一强制指令。无线型号须取得电波法下强制性的MIC技适（技適）技术基准适合认证，由日本登录认证机构颁发。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准不能作为独立的日本符合性证据。上述EMC/无线电义务与电池本身的DENAN菱形PSE标志并行适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬於電子裝置，須透過VCCI自律規制方案（基於CISPR）適用日本EMC框架，這是實際市場期望而非單一強制指令。無線型號須取得電波法下強制性的MIC技適（技適）技術基準適合認證，由日本登錄認證機構頒發。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准不能作為獨立的日本符合性證據。上述EMC/無線電義務與電池本身的DENAN菱形PSE標誌並行適用。

source.publisher: VCCI Council — Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment (Japan)
